steps.title: Use the positive clue
steps.content: The sentence explains that being featured suggested a business was an important part of the community. That context makes the blank positive: being included would help or benefit a business.

steps.title: Reject negative or weak meanings
steps.content: Choice A suggests danger, and choice B suggests a false impression. Choice D means not noteworthy, which conflicts with being seen as important. The remaining word means beneficial or favorable, matching the context. The answer is C.
